docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HICKOX, LACEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, LYDIA $1,540.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,590.00, DEFENDANT MAY PAY THE JUDGMENT IN 4 MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF $400.00 EACH, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH BEGINNING JUNE 1, 2009. IF THE INSTALLMENT ISN'T PAID BY IT'S DUE DATE, PLAINTIFF MAY APPLY FOR AN ORDER AUTHORIZING A WRIT EXECUTION ISSUE FOR THE ENTIRE UNPAID BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0) SERVED MAY-02-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, LYDIA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY HICKOX, LACEY SMITH, LYDIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2009 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,540.00 FILED BY HICKOX, LACEY AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, LYDIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-27-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-27-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
